demographics.living_situation: lives alone; rarely leaves the house over the past year

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My lower back and hips are aching so deeply I can't stand straight, my legs are cramping violently, and I have absolutely no strength.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Tonight the pain and cramps got so bad I can't get out of my chair on my own, and I'm frightened by how much my hands and calves are seizing up.

symptom_narrative.onset: gradual over several months, with a sharp worsening today
symptom_narrative.duration: months of weakness and fatigue; bone pain for weeks; violent cramps for about the last 12 hours
symptom_narrative.character: deep, aching, poorly localised bone pain plus a feeling of having no strength; the cramps are sudden and gripping
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the pain and weakness are the worst they've ever been; I can barely move tonight
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: lower back, hips and pelvis, and down both legs; the cramps are in my calves and hands
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant aching that got dramatically worse today; the cramps come in waves
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing much — over-the-counter paracetamol barely takes the edge off
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: trying to stand up, walk, or change position
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've been really low and flat in my mood, and small cuts seem to take forever to heal
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: no clear episode like this before — it has crept up on me
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: chair-bound tonight; I can't rise from a chair without pulling myself up with my arms, and I walk with a rolling, unsteady waddle when I do manage it

past_medical_history.how_managed: not on any regular treatment; has stayed indoors a lot because of it

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: paracetamol from the chemist, taken as needed for the pain

social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: not eating especially well; barely any activity because of the pain and low mood
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: spends almost all day indoors with the blinds drawn and rarely gets outside or into the sun

access_barriers.transport: cannot mobilise safely tonight and lives alone, so getting to a clinic independently is difficult

objective_data_offered.value: on video the patient is gripping the arms of a chair, visibly wincing when shifting position, and cannot rise without pulling up with both arms; hands intermittently cramping
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: observed over a video call, not a hands-on examination

objective_data_offered.value: the room is dark with all the blinds drawn; patient states she rarely opens them or goes outside
